title: Cobblemon Vortex Violet
description: Cobblemon Vortex Violet is a complete Pokémon-style overhaul for Minecraft powered by Cobblemon and enhanced with expansive world generation, immersive combat, legendary encounters, and quality-of-life upgrades! With Biomes O’ Plenty transforming.
body:
NOTE: MAKE SURE TO DRAG DATAPACKS IN AND ALSO PUT THEM IN THE RESOURCE PACK FOLDER !!!!

Cobblemon Platinum is a complete Pokémon-style overhaul for Minecraft powered by Cobblemon and enhanced with expansive world generation, immersive combat, legendary encounters, and quality-of-life upgrades! With Biomes O’ Plenty transforming the world into a vibrant, diverse adventure and Simply Swords adding new combat variety, your Pokémon journey has never felt this alive.

You can battle for gym badges, hunt for mythicals, or build your dream team—Cobblemon Platinum turns Minecraft into the ultimate Pokémon adventure!

Features

Fully integrated Up to date AllTheMons legendary & mythical support

Biomes O’ Plenty biomes

Simply Swords for expanded weapon variety and combat immersion With Flight or Fight Reborn

Challenging trainer battles & badge-style gym system with even end game 100 battles tournament at the end for the best of the best

Huge set of QoL mods (minimap, inventory tweaks, performance,sorting, optimizations)

Encounter Pokémon like Zekrom, Hoopa, Rayquaza and more!

Cobblemon Violet Vortex delivers the ultimate Pokémon x Minecraft experience with richer worlds, smoother gameplay, and endless adventure.
